commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 3:5 And the greater room he lined with fir wood, which he overlaid with fine gold, and set thereon palm trees and chains. House, between the most holy place and the porch, (Tirinus) or it may comprise all but the porch. Hebrew, "he covered (or boarded) all this great house. "(Calmet) Deal boards interspersed with those of cedar, 3 Kings vi. (Tirinus) Fine, (obrizi. ) Hebrew, "of Parvaim, which is probably the same as Sepharvaim, Ophir, not far from Media and Colchis.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
